name: Cisco Meraki TA Tools
description: MCP tools for managing and querying the Cisco Meraki Add-on for Splunk
author: cisco-meraki-ta-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_meraki_check_health
tools.title: Cisco Meraki Health Check
tools.description: Check the health status of Cisco Meraki TA data collection. Shows event counts, active inputs, and sourcetype breakdown.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_cisco_meraki" disabled=0 | stats count as enabled_inputs | appendcols [| tstats count as meraki_events where index=meraki] | appendcols [| tstats dc(sourcetype) as sourcetype_count where index=meraki]
examples: How many Meraki events are being collected?

tools.name: cisco_meraki_list_inputs
tools.title: Cisco Meraki List Inputs
tools.description: List all configured data inputs for the Cisco Meraki TA with their status.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_cisco_meraki" | table title, eai:acl.app, disabled, index | sort title
examples: Show me the configured Meraki inputs

tools.name: cisco_meraki_devices
tools.title: Meraki Device Inventory
tools.description: Show Meraki device inventory including model, serial, network, and status.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:devices" | spath | stats latest(name) as name, latest(model) as model, latest(serial) as serial, latest(networkId) as networkId, latest(status) as status by mac | sort name

tools.name: cisco_meraki_audit_log
tools.title: Meraki Audit Log
tools.description: Show recent Meraki Dashboard configuration change audit events.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:audit" | spath | stats count by adminName, page, label | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_meraki_security_events
tools.title: Meraki Organization Security Events
tools.description: Show security events from the Meraki organization.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:organizationsecurity" | spath | stats count by eventType, clientName, srcIp | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_meraki_vpn_status
tools.title: Meraki VPN Status
tools.description: Show Meraki appliance VPN tunnel statuses.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:appliancesdwanstatuses" | spath | stats latest(vpnMode) as vpnMode, latest(exportedSubnets{}.subnet) as subnets by networkName, networkId | sort networkName

tools.name: cisco_meraki_licenses
tools.title: Meraki License Overview
tools.description: Show Meraki organization license status and expiration.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:licensesoverview" | spath | head 1 | table status, expirationDate, licensedDeviceCounts.*

tools.name: cisco_meraki_assurance_alerts
tools.title: Meraki Assurance Alerts
tools.description: Show Meraki assurance alerts for network health issues.
tools.spl: index=meraki sourcetype="meraki:assurancealerts" | spath | stats count by type, severity, category.type, network.name | sort -severity -count
